name: Topcon OPUS A3e
summary: Compact 4.3 inch OPUS A-series HMI for cost-sensitive control projects that still need CAN-Bus, USB and I/O.
description: The OPUS A3e is a compact A-series operator display for mobile machinery and control panels where space, cost and CAN-Bus integration matter. Eltronic can help specify the screen, wiring, mounting and software route around the wider application.
highlights: Display: 4.3 in, 15:9 TFT, 480 x 272 px, 400 cd/m2
Operator controls: Touchscreen option
Interfaces: 2 x CAN-Bus, Ethernet, RS232, USB 2.0 full speed, analog/digital I/O
Rugged rating: operating -30 to +65 deg C, storage -40 to +85 deg C, IP65/IP66 protection
